name: Carefor Bus Co
registry_source: NY DOS via nycompanyregistry / Dun & Bradstreet
notes: Source name 'Carefor Bus Co' appears to be a transcription artifact of CAREFUL BUS SERVICE INC; address (5015 Bay Pkwy, Brooklyn, NY 11230) matches exactly. NY DOS incorporation 2/6/1979 as domestic business corporation.

name: Cupie Transportation Corp
registry_source: Yelp listing marked CLOSED; NY WCB Empire State Transportation Workers' Comp Trust roster lists 'Cupie Transportation Corp' at 145-165 Wolcott St, Brooklyn
notes: No FMCSA/SAFER record found by direct keyword search ('CUPIE' returns no records). Yelp shows business CLOSED as of Nov 2025. Workers' comp trust roster confirms entity existed at 145-165 Wolcott St, Brooklyn (matches input address). Possible related entity 'Cupie Bus Service, Inc.' at 165 Wolcott. NY DOS public inquiry not accessible; entity status not confirmed via official registry but business appears defunct.

name: School Student Transportation
registry_source: PA Dept of State (entity number not retrieved); D&B / Manta / company sources
notes: Legal name on FMCSA is 'D B FISHER SCHOOL STUDENT TRANSPORTATION INC' (DBA 'D B FISHER INC'). Physical address 1715 Grace Ave matches input exactly. FMCSA snapshot shows only 1 power unit / 1 driver in MCS-150 (1/13/2026) - likely understated for an intrastate-only school bus operator; actual fleet larger per business records (annual rev ~$2.85M, ~80 employees per third-party sources). Related D B Fisher Charter Bus Co Inc reportedly founded 1966.

name: Sunrise Busses Inc
registry_source: NY DOS (DOS ID 117679, initial filing 3/3/1959, active) via bizprofile.net
notes: No direct FMCSA SAFER record found under name 'SUNRISE BUSSES' (keyword search returned no records). Sister company 'Sunrise Coach Lines Inc' (USDOT 25607, MC-100147, 20 power units, 14 drivers) is separately registered and operates charter/transit, while Sunrise Busses Inc is the school-bus arm contracting with 6 school districts on Long Island's North/South Forks (per business reporting). NY DOS shows entity Active with biennial statement 'past due' (due 3/31/2023). Address 74675 West Front St matches input.

name: Beach Transportation
